Bash(cd E:/contrastive/AS2CL-AD && /d/software/miniconda3/python.exe -c "
import sys, types
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
pkg = types.ModuleType\('model'\); pkg.__path__ = ['model']
sys.modules['model'] = pkg

from model.Transformer import AS2CLAD_Encoder
import torch

B, L, D = 4, 100, 12
x = torch.randn\(B, L, D\)
model = AS2CLAD_Encoder\(win_size=L, enc_in=D, d_model=512, n_heads=8,
                         e_layers=3, d_ff=512, d_proj=128, dropout=0.0\)
model.eval\(\)
with torch.no_grad\(\):
    Z, H = model\(x\)
print\(f'input  x : {x.shape}'\)
print\(f'encoder H: {H.shape}'\)
print\(f'proj    Z: {Z.shape}'\)
" 2>&1)
